/usr/bin/clang -g -m64 -pie -nostdlib -nostartfiles -nodefaultlibs -Wl,-T,/home/ellicode/Documents/protOS/kernel/linker.ld -Wl,--build-id=none -Wl,-z,max-page-size=0x1000 -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/kernel.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/kernel.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/kernel.dir/src/string.c.o CMakeFiles/kernel.dir/src/debug/logger.c.o CMakeFiles/kernel.dir/src/debug/serial.c.o CMakeFiles/kernel.dir/src/graphics/tty.c.o CMakeFiles/kernel.dir/src/graphics/vga.c.o CMakeFiles/kernel.dir/src/globals.c.o CMakeFiles/kernel.dir/src/boot.c.o -o kernel
